api_token.description: AppsFlyer Pull API token, sent as a Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <api_token>). Never logged.

app_id.description: AppsFlyer app identifier the raw-data export reports are scoped to (path-substituted).

base_url.description: AppsFlyer API base URL override for tests or proxies.

start_date.description: Report start date (YYYY-MM-DD or a value with a time component; only the date portion is sent as the 'from' query param).

end_date.description: Report end date (YYYY-MM-DD); defaults to start_date when unset.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
